reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_206]]
Speaker 1: This is a faculty collaboration that spans the ocean, with both sides working together to create the highest-quality academic programs possible for students in China.

[[BLOCK:srt_207]]
Speaker 2: One of the greatest advantages of partnering with Beacon Education (彼岸教育) is that

[[BLOCK:srt_208]]
Speaker 2: we are able to integrate the very best professional resources and expertise from both sides.

[[BLOCK:srt_209]]
Speaker 2: We are a university deeply committed to academic excellence and student success, while Beacon Education has a strong understanding of students’ real-world needs and ensures that their voices are fully heard. This allows us to design more thoughtful teaching formats, instructional approaches, and course content—so that what we offer truly meets their needs.

[[BLOCK:srt_210]]
Speaker 3: Thank you for sharing this achievement and honor with us.

[[BLOCK:srt_211]]
Speaker 3: From your personal perspective, what role do you envision Golden Gate University playing within China’s higher education landscape?

[[BLOCK:srt_212]]
Speaker 1: We hope to continue providing truly valuable programs to students in China, while constantly evolving to stay closely aligned with their needs and offering an even more diverse range of courses.

[[BLOCK:srt_213]]
Speaker 1: Looking ahead, we will continue to deepen our presence in China and keep moving forward.

[[BLOCK:srt_214]]
Speaker 3: Is there anything else you would like to add?

[[BLOCK:srt_215]]
Speaker 3: All right, let’s move on to the next question.

[[BLOCK:srt_216]]
Speaker 3: Golden Gate University also actively encourages online students to travel to San Francisco to attend the commencement ceremony (commencement ceremony).

[[BLOCK:srt_217]]
Speaker 3: Why do you believe that attending the commencement ceremony in person is such an important milestone for students?
